ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Accounting, Report, Fees, Final Distribution
Off Calendar Apr-23-2025 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances (via Zoom videoconference):
Justin Hedemark, Esq., for and with Elena M. Kostas, Administrator.

At the outset, Mr. Hedemark offers testimony regarding whether he has received any feedback from Beneficiaries regarding the instant petition. Mr. Hedemark confirms that he has not been advised of any objections to the instant petition. The court advises that it intends to take the matter under submission to grant the petition but with modifications to the compensation requested therein.

Judge: Hon. Ross C. Moody. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: Singh. Not Reported.
